# Random Slopes and Varying Effects

```{r}
#| label: setup-09-random-slopes
#| include: false
source("../R/setup.R")
```

## Overview

Multivariate normal priors, Cholesky parameterisation, and repeated-measures examples.

## Learning objectives

By the end of this chapter you will be able to:

- [ ] Objective 1
- [ ] Objective 2
- [ ] Objective 3

## Content

*Content to be written.*

## Exercises

1. Exercise 1
2. Exercise 2

## Summary

*Summary to be written.*
